title: Decision Flow for Selecting and Applying t-tests
description: A flowchart guiding a data scientist through the process of selecting the appropriate type of t-test based on their data's characteristics and research question, and then interpreting the results.
relationships: Flow from 'Start' to 'Check Number of Groups'
If one group, flow to 'One-Sample t-test'
If two groups, flow to 'Check Data Pairing'
If groups are independent, flow to 'Independent t-test'
If groups are paired/dependent, flow to 'Paired t-test'
